docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-29-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST KATRINA SCHNEIDER FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-29-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-13-2013. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-26-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHNEIDER, KATRINA AS TO DEFENDANT ACOSTA, ARNULFO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-12-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-11-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-27-2012

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-29-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-12-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST KATRINA SCHNEIDER FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-26-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-11-2013. ***NOTE: SANCTIONS PREVIOUSLY ISSUED TO KATRINA SCHNEIDER IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE JAN-29-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ARE ALSO DUE. TOTAL AMOUNT DUE $700.00.*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-14-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAY-14-2013 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-29-2013 CONTINUED TO MAR-26-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-26-2013 CONTINUED TO MAY-14-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). **NOTE: IF THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE, ANSWER OR DEFAULT AS TO DEFENDANT(S), AND NO APPEARANCE AT THE MAY-14-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING, THE COURT INTENDS TO DISMISS THIS MATTER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
